label: 1581 CE
era_summary: 1581 (MDLXXXI) was a common year starting on Sunday in the Julian calendar, and a common year starting on Thursday in the Proleptic Gregorian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1581 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1581: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Portugal-Malabar, 1575-85; Spain-Netherlands (with intervention from France and England), 1578-1587. Maddison records GDP/capita 1279 (ESP, 1581) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
